name: Ilika plc
summary: Ilika plc engages in the design, development, and production of solid state batteries primarily in the United Kingdom, Asia, Europe, and North America. It offers batteries for a range of applications in the industrial Internet of Things, electric vehicles, smart cities/building, consumer electronics, medical, automotive, military, and aerospace sectors. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Romsey, the United Kingdom.
